title: UAT Checklist
description: Schema for UAT checklist files used by the UAT CheckList Editor

ProjectName.description: Name of the project or solution under test

ReleaseLabel.description: Release version, sprint, or build identifier (e.g., 'v2.1.0-rc1', 'Sprint 14')

DocumentDate.description: Last-saved timestamp, auto-populated by the editor on save

Configuration.description: Editor UI state (column widths, etc.). Managed by the editor — do not hand-edit

reviewWidths.description: Saved column widths for the review table

Review.description: The checklist items, grouped by FunctionalArea and Subarea

FunctionalArea.description: Top-level grouping (e.g., 'Authentication', 'Issue Management'). Rendered as a section header in the editor

Subarea.description: Second-level grouping within a functional area (e.g., 'Login', 'Create Issue'). Rendered as a subsection header

ItemLabel.description: Short name for this checklist item (e.g., 'Standard Login', 'Validation')

HumanAction.description: Step-by-step action the tester should perform. Used when Steps is absent; superseded by Steps when present

Expectation.description: Expected result after performing the action. Used when Steps is absent

Steps.description: Optional structured steps. When present, supersedes HumanAction/Expectation for display. Each step has an action and a list of verifications. Backward compatibility: when absent, the editor falls back to HumanAction/Expectation

Action.description: What the tester does. Supports {{VariableName}} placeholders resolved against TestData

Verifications.description: Checks the tester performs after the action. Rendered as an indented bullet list under the step

VerificationMethod.description: How the verification is performed. Defaults to 'ui' when absent. Non-ui methods render with a small badge

Query.description: SQL query for 'sql' verifications. Displayed inline so the tester can run it

ExpectedValue.description: Expected value the verification should yield. Type varies by verification

TestData.description: Optional map of {{VariableName}} substitutions applied to each step's Action text. Lets the same checklist run against different environments without editing step text

E2ETestReference.description: Optional identifier of the automated E2E test that mirrors these steps (e.g., 'ClassName.MethodName'). Makes coverage auditable and is consumed by the uat-coverage-review task

IsJudgmentItem.description: When true, marks a cosmetic/UX item that cannot be automated and is exempt from the E2E coverage requirement. Editor renders a 'Human Judgment' badge. The uat-coverage-review task skips these items

Passes.description: Whether this item passed testing. Always false for 'Other' items

Feedback.description: Tester's observations, notes, or bug description

IsOtherItem.description: When true, this is an open-ended feedback row. The editor auto-generates one per subarea if not present. HumanAction and Expectation are ignored
